html:
{% for item in doc.items %}
{% if item.material_type == "Fabrics" %} {% endif %}
GRN No: {{ doc.name }}
Date: {{ frappe.format_date(doc.posting_date or doc.creation, "dd-MMM-yyyy") }} Item Code: {{ item.item_code or "" }}
Color: {{ item.color or "" }} Batch No: {{ item.batch_no or "" }}
Lot No: {{ item.lot_no or "" }} Received Qty: {{ item.received_quantity or 0 }}
Roll/Box No: {{ item.roll_no or "" }} UOM: {{ item.uom or "" }}
Warehouse: {{ item.selected_warehouse or "" }} Boxes/Rolls: {{ item.no_of_boxespacks or "" }}
Length: {{ item.fabric_length or "" }} Width: {{ item.fabric_width or "" }}
Composition: {{ item.composition or "" }} Shade: {{ item.shade or "" }}
{% if item.item_barcode_image %} {% else %}
No Barcode Available
{% endif %}
{% endfor %}
name: GRN Barcode Labels
